rationale: Both reviews correctly identify the missing @[simp] on fiberHomeomorph_one (confirmed at line 54 in the diff). Review 2's additional finding — removing coe_eq_of_mem_stabilizer_fiber and mem_stabilizer_fiber_of_coe_eq (lines 125–134, confirmed as trivial .mp/.mpr wrappers of mem_stabilizer_fiber_iff) — is a genuine API surface reduction grounded in the diff. Review 1's extra finding (adding fiberHomeomorph_inv) is speculative and additive beyond what the roadmap stage evidences, and its suggestion to @[simp]-annotate fiberHomeomorph_mul is not clearly safe; acting on Review 2 yields a tighter, more idiomatic API with no unnecessary wrappers.
